headline: Susquehanna Maintains Neutral on Enphase Energy, Raises Price Target to $45
summary: Susquehanna  analyst Biju Perincheril   maintains Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $32 to $45.
